chunks.text: Customer Rewards Programme — Complete Guide Welcome to the PAAF Grocery Rewards Programme. This guide explains how to earn, redeem, and maximise your reward points on every purchase. How to Earn Points You earn reward points automatically on every completed transaction. The standard earning rate is 1 point per ¹10 spent. Points are calculated on the pre-discount order total and credited to your account within 24 hours of delivery confirmation. • Standard purchases : 1 point per ¹10 • Weekend bonus : 2 point

24 hours of delivery confirmation. • Standard purchases : 1 point per ¹10 • Weekend bonus : 2 points per ¹10 (Sat & Sun) • Festive sale : 3 points per ¹10 • First order bonus : 200 extra points • Referral bonus : 150 points per successful referral Reward Tiers Customers are automatically upgraded to higher tiers based on their cumulative annual spend. Higher tiers unlock better rewards and exclusive offers. Silver ¹0 – ¹4,999/year — 1x points, standard delivery Gold ¹5,000 – ¹14,999/year — 1.5x points, pri

Silver ¹0 – ¹4,999/year — 1x points, standard delivery Gold ¹5,000 – ¹14,999/year — 1.5x points, priority delivery Platinum ¹15,000+/year — 2x points, free express delivery How to Redeem Points Points can be redeemed at checkout. The minimum redemption is 100 points ( ¹10 value). You can redeem a maximum of 500 points ( ¹50) per order. Redemption is available only on orders above ¹199. Conversion rate: 100 points = ¹10 discount Minimum redemption: 100 points Maximum per order: 500 points ( ¹50) Minimum orde

ints = ¹10 discount Minimum redemption: 100 points Maximum per order: 500 points ( ¹50) Minimum order value: ¹199 Points Expiry Earned points are valid for 12 months from the date of credit. Points are consumed on a first-earned, first- used basis. You will receive an email notification 30 days before any points are set to expire. Frequently Asked Questions Q: Can I transfer points to another account? A: No. Points are non-transferable and linked to your mobile number. Q: What happens to points if I return

Points are non-transferable and linked to your mobile number. Q: What happens to points if I return an item? A: Points earned on returned items are reversed from your balance. Q: Do points apply on discounted items? A: Yes, points are earned on the final amount paid after all discounts. Q: Can I use points with a coupon code? A: Yes, points and coupons can be combined in a single order. Q: How do I check my points balance? A: Log in to the app or website and go to My Account > Rewards. For assistance with y
oints balance? A: Log in to the app or website and go to My Account > Rewards. For assistance with your rewards account, contact support@paaf.store or call 1800-123-4567 (Mon–Sat, 9 AM – 6 PM).

eCommerce Store — Policy Document Effective Date: January 1, 2025 1. Return & Refund Policy Customers may return any grocery item within 7 days of purchase if the product is unused, unopened, and in its original packaging. Perishable items such as dairy, meat, and fresh produce are non-returnable once delivered. Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days to the original payment method. For damaged or defective products, a full refund or replacement will be issued within 24 hours of reporting the issue.

ctive products, a full refund or replacement will be issued within 24 hours of reporting the issue. 2. Delivery Policy Standard delivery is available Monday to Saturday, 9 AM – 8 PM. Express delivery (within 2 hours) is available in select areas for an additional charge of ¹49. Free delivery is offered on orders above ¹999. Orders placed before 12 PM are eligible for same-day delivery. Delivery slots must be selected at checkout and cannot be changed after order confirmation. 3. Reward Points Policy Custome

selected at checkout and cannot be changed after order confirmation. 3. Reward Points Policy Customers earn 1 reward point for every ¹10 spent. Reward points can be redeemed at a rate of 100 points = ¹10 discount on future orders. Points expire 12 months from the date of earning. Bonus reward points (3x) are awarded during festive sales and special promotions. Points cannot be transferred between accounts or redeemed for cash. 4. Payment Policy We accept UPI, credit/debit cards, net banking, and cash on del

redeemed for cash. 4. Payment Policy We accept UPI, credit/debit cards, net banking, and cash on delivery. EMI options are available on orders above ¹2,000 for select bank cards. All online transactions are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption. Cash on delivery is available for orders below ¹5,000. A convenience fee of ¹25 applies to COD orders. Payment must be made in full at the time of delivery. 5. Privacy Policy We collect customer mobile numbers, purchase history, and delivery addresses solely for proce

Policy We collect customer mobile numbers, purchase history, and delivery addresses solely for processing orders and personalising the shopping experience. Customer data is never sold to third parties. Customers may request deletion of their account and associated data by contacting support@paaf.store. Data deletion requests are processed within 30 days. 6. Cancellation Policy Orders can be cancelled within 30 minutes of placement at no charge. After 30 minutes, cancellation may not be possible if the order

0 minutes of placement at no charge. After 30 minutes, cancellation may not be possible if the order has been dispatched. For prepaid orders, refunds for cancellations are processed within 3–5 business days.

(100g) ¹210 | 21 pts | Limited • Fruit Juice (1L) ¹99 | 10 pts | In Stock Prices are inclusive of all taxes. Reward points are credited within 24 hours of delivery confirmation. Seasonal items may vary. For bulk orders above 50 units, contact sales@paaf.store for special pricing.
